title: Closest Subsequence Sum
titleCn: 最接近目标值的子序列和

testcases.input: nums = [5,-7,3,5], goal = 6 Output: 0 Explanation: Choose the whole array as a subsequence, with a sum of 6. This is equal to the goal, so the absolute difference is 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Choose the whole array as a subsequence, with a sum of 6. This is equal to the goal, so the absolute difference is 0.

testcases.input: nums = [7,-9,15,-2], goal = -5 Output: 1 Explanation: Choose the subsequence [7,-9,-2], with a sum of -4. The absolute difference is abs(-4 - (-5)) = abs(1) = 1, which is the minimum.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Choose the subsequence [7,-9,-2], with a sum of -4. The absolute difference is abs(-4 - (-5)) = abs(1) = 1, which is the minimum.
